results.title: 2025-26 Season in Review: Sidney Crosby
results.description: Vitals Player: Sidney CrosbyBorn: Aug 7, 1987Height: 5’11”Weight: 200 poundsHometown: Cole Harbour, Nova Scotia, CanadaShoots: LeftDraft: First round pick (1st overall) in 2005 by the Penguins2024-25 Statistics: 68 games played; 29 goals; 45 assists; 74 points; one goal and four assists in six playoff gamesContract Status: 2026-27 is the final season on Crosby’s current contract. He’s eligible to officially extend on July 1. Story [...]

results.description: The New England Patriots will have their share of hotly-contested positional competitions for making their 53-man roster in 2026.

results.title: Qatar put on an embarrassing display at the World Cup vs Canada
results.description: Qatar severely injured a Canadian star, received two red cards, and lost by 6 goals on a nightmare day at the World Cup.

results.title: Iran to launch complaint to FIFA over US World Cup treatment
results.description: Iran's head coach has said his team is the 'most oppressed' at the 2026 World Cup.

results.title: Spider-Man: Web of Shadows Returns Through Fan-Made PC Remaster
results.description: A classic 2008 Spider-Man game, Spider-Man: Web of Shadows, has been restored and re-released as an enhanced PC version via emulation, offering HD graphics and high frame rates after years of being unavailable.
